allow: Bash(gemini -p "Search for successful AI PC builds for local LLM inference in 2024-2025. Focus on Reddit r/LocalLLaMA and r/homelab posts where users share their complete builds for running coding models like Codestral, DeepSeek Coder, Code Llama, and general LLMs. I need real component lists, prices, and reported performance metrics \(tokens per second\). Include both new and used GPU options. Find builds at different price points: budget \(~$1500\), mid-range \(~$2500\), and high-end \(~$4000+\). Include URLs to the source posts.")

PowerShell($names = "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY","ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN","ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL","ANTHROPIC_MODEL","CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN"; foreach \($n in $names\) { $proc = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\($n, "Process"\); $user = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\($n, "User"\); $mach = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\($n, "Machine"\); "{0,-25} Process={1}  User={2}  Machine={3}" -f $n, \($proc -ne $null -and $proc -ne ''\), \($user -ne $null -and $user -ne ''\), \($mach -ne $null -and $mach -ne ''\) })

PowerShell($cj = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json"; if \(Test-Path $cj\) { $j = Get-Content $cj -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "Top-level keys mentioning auth/key:"; $j.PSObject.Properties.Name | Where-Object { $_ -match 'key|auth|oauth|token|login' } } ; $cred = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\.credentials.json"; if \(Test-Path $cred\) { "`n.credentials.json exists. Keys:"; \(Get-Content $cred -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).PSObject.Properties.Name } else { "`n.credentials.json not found" })
